---
title: ""
about:
    template: marquee
---
<style>
  .full-width-image {
    width: 100%; /
    height: auto; 
    display: block; 
    margin: 20px 0; 
  }
</style>

<style>
.text-box {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); 
  border: 1px solid #a3c1da; 
  box-shadow: 10px 10px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); 
  border-radius: 10px; 
  padding: 20px; 
  margin: 20px; 
  max-width: 800px; 
  box-sizing: border-box; 
}
</style>

<style>
body {
  background-color: #f0f7ff;
}
</style>


<figure class="text-center">
  <blockquote class="blockquote" style="font-size: 80px;">
    <p class="mb-0"style="color: black; font-weight: bold;">Aim</p>
  </blockquote>
</figure>


<div class="image-container">
  <img src="https://www.aljazeera.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/10/Electoral-College-forecasts-02.jpg?resize=770%2C513&quality=80" alt="Descriptive text for the image" class="full-width-image"/>
</div>

<figure class="text-center">
<h2>
  Final Output
  <small class="text-body-secondary"> We have multiple goals for our final data analysis</small>
</h2>
</figure>
<h2>
   Interactive map
</h2>


<blockquote class="blockquote" style="color: #FEFEFE; font-size: 25px; background-color: rgba(3, 82, 128, 0.5); padding: 20px; border-radius: 50px;">
    <p class="mb-0"> We aim to privide an interactive map of the United States where users can access two main peices of information:
        <ul>
            <ul> 
            </ul>
            <li> 
            A list attached to each state listing out the most commonly appearing buzzwords across our data. Words that represent interests, political preferences, state sources of pride and so on. 
            </li>
            <ul> 
            </ul>
            <li> A poltical spectrum rating. this number will represent the states placement on a republican to democrat scale through cross analysing content from the state's data and the two parties' data.  </li>
        </ul> 
   </p>
</blockquote>

<h2>
   AI Generated Speach
</h2>

<blockquote class="blockquote" style="color: #FEFEFE; font-size: 25px; background-color: rgba(3, 82, 128, 0.5); padding: 20px; border-radius: 50px;">
    <p class="mb-0"> 
        <ul> We also aim to create an AI Generated speech for a chosen state using our data to see how a presidential candidate might interpret are findings and use them to his advantage. This speech will be accompanied by an AI generated video of a president saying reciting the speech       
        </ul> 
   </p>
  </blockquote>
